mapper.select: select id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_publisher, create_time from t_notice
mapper.insert: insert into t_notice(notice_title, notice_content, notice_publisher, create_time) values (#{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{noticePublisher}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
update t_notice
notice_title = #{noticeTitle},
notice_content = #{noticeContent},
notice_publisher = #{noticePublisher},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_notice where id in
#{item}
